channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Memory supply gap stretches beyond 2028 as cloud capex tops US$725 billion
item.description: Global cloud service providers have recently raised capital spending to about US$725 billion, accelerating the shift of memory resources toward AI and prompting suppliers and customers to secure long-term agreements, or LTAs, three to five years in advance.

item.title: Why is AMD stock soaring nearly 19% after blockbuster earnings, and are AMD shares signaling Wall Street’s biggest AI power shift yet as demand rewrites the chip playbook?
item.description: AMD stock up nearly 19% today after blockbuster earnings beat. Something shifted in the semiconductor world on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. AMD stock didn't just rise — it lunged. Shares of Advanced Micro Devices climbed 18.9% in a single session, adding more than… [AMD]

item.title: AMD Stock Explodes 15%+: AI Chip Demand Fuels Blockbuster Q1 Earnings and Bullish Outlook
item.description: NEW YORK — Advanced Micro Devices Inc. shares skyrocketed more than 15% in early trading Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the semiconductor giant delivered stronger-than-expected first-quarter results and raised expectations for continued explosive growth driven… [AMD]

item.title: Is Alphabet overtaking Nvidia? The AI chip king's reign is under threat
item.description: Alphabet is closing in on Nvidia's position as the world's most valuable company. Strong growth in Alphabet's cloud and AI businesses is driving this shift. The company is also developing its own AI chips, challenging Nvidia's dominance. Investors are watc… [Alphabet, Nvidia]
